name: Vegetable Casserole (Vegetarian)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon ground basil, or 2 teaspoons fresh basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice onions and green peppers. Peel and dice carrots. Cut broccoli into florets and stems. For Swiss chard or spinach, wash, trim, and cut into bite-sized pieces.
2. Sauté onions and peppers in oil in a large skillet over medium heat until fragrant.
3. Add broccoli, carrots, tomato sauce, bay leaf, basil (ground or fresh), and salt to taste. Stir well. Bring mixture to a boil, cover, reduce heat to low, and simmer for about 15 minutes, or until vegetables are just tender.
4. Stir in chopped Swiss chard or spinach. Transfer the mixture to a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish.
5. Blend parsley into mashed potatoes and spread evenly over the top of the vegetable mixture.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes. If desired, sprinkle with paprika before serving. Serve hot or warm.
